last_cycle.summary: Q123 learn: synthesized AND/OR gate ↔ RAVEL Cause/Isolate ↔ FAD bias unified framework. KG entry written. AND-gate=monosemantic=high Isolate; OR-gate=polysemantic=low Isolate. r=−0.70 reframed as polysemanticity finding.
